propositions: Code review is too loose: zero blocking finding votes across 162 post-recalibration changes while confirmed must-fix findings passed as advisories below the 0.95 threshold.
A blocking threshold should be derived from adjudicated field data and enabled for serious-tier code-review criteria over the code-v2 cohort, passing the ADR-0036 A/B gate before flipping.
Agent guidance mandating remediation of all valid plan-review advisories should be loosened to judgment so organic advisory uptake can be measured.
Completion-verifier FAIL verdicts are not durably persisted, ratchet piecemeal, and signed-children epic ACs defeat the certifiable:false escape hatch.
Leaf plans drift from their parent's scope and no plan-review criterion checks leaf scope against the parent until epic-close, motivating a claim-gating containment criterion.
The plan-review claim gate exhibits verdict instability and non-monotonic, non-convergent remediation, so a fail-closed gate cannot be satisfied by honest bounded iteration.
